text: Your APR and Total Amount Payable are calculated at the time the agreement is made. We dont include any introductory or promotional offers or any cashback you could earn.

jargon_terms: APR, total amount payable, promotional offers

text: For some consumers, credit will not be the right answer. Access to unaffordable credit is harmful to consumers' financial and personal wellbeing. text: We charge different interest rates on different balances. Your simple standard and cash interest rates will move up and down in line with changes to the Bank of England Base Rate
text_simplified_reference: We charge different interest rates on different balances. Your standard and cash interest rates will move up and down in line with changes to the Bank of England Base Rate.

text: Credit scores are based on experience over time. The more experience you have using credit responsibly and paying your bills on time, the more information there is to determine whether you are a good credit risk.
text_simplified_reference: Credit scores are built up over time based on experience. The more experience you have using credit responsibly and paying your bills on time, the more information there is to assess whether you are a good credit risk.

text: Based on that information, we might change our view about whether you can actually repay us. If we do, we may change the rates that apply to you (unless we know that youre at risk of financial difficulties) and we may reduce your credit limit.

text: Review and fact-check your credit report. If you find an error, dispute it with the credit reporting company or the business that furnished the information to the credit reporting company.
text_simplified_reference: Review your credit report and check it for errors. If you find an error, dispute it with the credit reporting company or the business that provided the information to the credit reporting company.

text: Where the debtor has exercised a right to redeem, and has made payment of the whole amount due, or has performed the whole obligations of the debtor under the contract to which the security relates, the creditor shall grant a discharge in the terms prescribed in section 17 of this Act.
text_simplified_reference: Where the borrower has exercised the right to redeem and has paid the full amount owed, or has met all obligations under the contract to which the security relates, the lender must grant a discharge in the form set out in section 17 of this Act.

text: When market interest rates rise, prices of fixed-rate bonds fall. this phenomenon is known as interest rate risk. A seesaw, such as the one pictured below, can help you visualize the relationship between market interest rates and bond prices.
text_simplified_reference: When market interest rates rise, the prices of fixed-rate bonds fall. This is known as interest rate risk. A seesaw can help you picture the relationship between market interest rates and bond prices: when one goes up, the other goes down.
jargon_terms: interest rate risk, fixed-rate bonds, market interest rates

text: In this letter we focus on three portfolios in the Consumer Lending market: High-Cost Lending, Mainstream Consumer Credit Lending and Credit Unions. When we refer to Consumer Lending throughout this letter, we are only referring to these portfolios.

text: Cash Fee 2.99 of the cash or cash-related payment (minimum 3). Default fees If youre late making the minimum payment: 12. If youre over your credit limit (even if weve allowed you to go over)

text: In instances where prospective consumers are declined credit, we expect firms, as set out in the Consumer Duty guidance, to provide other forms of support. Ineffective management of declined credit can increase the risk of consumers going to illegal money lenders as they may not be aware of alternative options.
text_simplified_reference: Where prospective consumers are declined credit, we expect firms, as set out in the Consumer Duty guidance, to provide other forms of support. Poor management of declined credit applications can increase the risk of consumers turning to illegal money lenders, as they may not be aware of other options available to them.
jargon_terms: Consumer Duty, declined credit, illegal money lenders

text: You pay with a credit card from a bank. The bank pays the store for your groceries. The bank sends you the credit card bill, including charges for the groceries.
text_simplified_reference: You pay for your groceries with a credit card from a bank. The bank pays the store on your behalf. The bank then sends you a credit card bill, including the amount charged for your groceries.

text: The total amount payable by you is the sum of the loan and the interest. What are our rights if you miss a repayment or if we have other concerns? Although the interest is added upfront, we calculate the interest and the APR as if the loan were repaid over time.

text: Unsecured loan: A loan (such as most types of credit cards) that does not use property as collateral. Lenders consider these loans to be more risky than secured loans, so they may charge a higher rate of interest for them.
text_simplified_reference: Unsecured loan: a loan, such as most credit cards, that does not use property as collateral. Lenders consider these loans to be riskier than secured loans, so they may charge a higher interest rate.

text: If you find an error, dispute it with the credit reporting company or the business that furnished the information to the credit reporting company. You can also reach out directly to the credit reporting companies to dispute errors or submit a complaint to the Bureau.
